fields.label: Label
fields.description: Shown as the column header in RAPL Late Mark Processing (e.g. '9:46-10:00').

fields.label: From Time
fields.description: Inclusive. A check-in exactly at this time falls into this band.

fields.label: To Time
fields.description: Inclusive. Anything later than every defined band's To Time triggers native Half Day instead.

fields.label: Fraction
fields.description: Fraction of one day's salary deducted per occurrence in this band.
